title: Speed Trading
description: Adds a button to the villager trading GUI to repeat the current trade until it's no longer available.
body:
Trade away all your worldly possessions with ease! This mod adds a button to the trading GUI to repeat the trade until it can't be repeated no more.  
There's also 2 config options: one for the amount of ticks between each refill/trade operation and one that blocks certain trades from being repeated.

The mod can be configured using Mod Menu, or you can edit the configuration file manually at `config/speedtrading.json5`.

*This mod is entirely client-side, and doesn't need to be installed on the server to work (in fact, it does nothing on a server).*
